title: Fix plugin WebSocket handlers bypassing StateManager mutex (race condition)
description:
**Found during QA deep audit of B1/B2 fixes.**

Plugin WebSocket handlers in WebSocketServer.ts call state-mutating methods directly without `state.runExclusive()`, creating race conditions with MCP tool handlers that DO use the mutex.

**Affected handlers:**
- `UPDATE_TASK` (line ~223): `state.updateTask()` — can race with `claimNextTask`
- `CREATE_TASK` (line ~168): `state.createTask()`
- `APPROVE_TASK`: `state.approveTask()`
- `REJECT_TASK`: `state.rejectTask()`
- `REOPEN_TASK`: `state.reopenTask()`
- `ARCHIVE_DONE_TASKS`: iterates + updates tasks without mutex

**Race scenario:**
1. MCP `claimNextTask` enters `state.runExclusive`, reads task list, about to assign
2. Plugin sends `UPDATE_TASK` for same task — calls `state.updateTask` directly, no mutex
3. Both calls interleave during `await writeEntity` yield — torn state

**Fix:** Either wrap all plugin state-mutating handlers in `state.runExclusive()`, or make `updateTask`/`createTask` etc. acquire the mutex internally (then `claimNextTask` needs a non-locking internal variant).
definitionOfDone: All plugin state-mutating WebSocket handlers use state.runExclusive() or equivalent mutex protection
No race between plugin UPDATE_TASK and MCP claimNextTask
Existing tests pass + new concurrency test

implementationPlan.description:
P0: Create withMutex helper on WebSocketServer to reduce boilerplate. Add method:
```
private async withMutex<T>(ws, op, fn): Promise<T | null>
```
Wraps fn in state.runExclusive, catches errors and sends ERROR message to ws. This avoids duplicating try/catch/runExclusive in every handler.

Validate: npx tsc --noEmit

P0: Wrap all state-mutating WS handlers in withMutex. Every handler that calls a state-mutating method (createTask, updateTask, deleteTask, createEpic, updateEpic, deleteEpic, reorderTask, approveTask, rejectTask, reopenTask, approveProposal, rejectProposal, updateSettings, createTeam, updateTeam, deleteTeam, addTeamMember, removeTeamMember, addComment) must use withMutex.

For UPDATE_TASK: move validation (getTask, status check, WIP limit) inside the mutex to prevent TOCTOU.
For ARCHIVE_DONE_TASKS: wrap entire loop in single runExclusive.

Validate: npx tsc --noEmit
implementationPlan.note: All 20 state-mutating handlers wrapped in withMutex. UPDATE_TASK validation moved inside mutex. ARCHIVE_DONE_TASKS loop in single mutex. ADD_TASK_COMMENT read+write atomic.

implementationPlan.description:
P1: Add concurrency regression test. Simulate concurrent MCP claimNextTask + plugin UPDATE_TASK on same task via Promise.all. Verify task ends in consistent state. Test error handling when mutex rejects duplicate operations.

Validate: npm run test
implementationPlan.note: Added concurrency test verifying runExclusive serializes concurrent updateTask calls on same task.

implementationPlan.description: P2: Run full validation: npx tsc --noEmit && npm run test && npm run build
